title: Chip
description: Overlay indicator (counter or dot) positioned over another element like an avatar or icon. Also works as an inline pill when there is no anchor.

counter.title: Counter over icon
counter.desc: Overlay counter on an icon. Use max to cap the value at 99+.

dot.title: Dot over avatar
dot.desc: Presence indicator with no content over an avatar.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual treatments for the overlay chip.

inline.title: Inline (no anchor)
inline.desc: When there is no default slot, the chip renders in flow as a pill.

props.content: Visible content (number or short string). Ignored when dot is active.
props.dot: Renders a small indicator with no content.
props.invisible: Hides the chip while keeping it in the tree.
props.showZero: Shows the chip even when content is 0 (hidden by default).
props.variant: Visual style applied to the chip.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the chip.
props.size: Chip size. Cascades from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.placement: Anchor corner where the overlay chip is positioned.
props.icon: Optional decorative icon (ignored in dot mode).
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name. Recommended for numeric or dot chips.

slots.default: Anchor for the overlay chip. If omitted, the chip renders inline as a pill.
